name: unity-kit
description: Unity development toolkit for Claude Code: create projects from a prompt (unity-init), launch the editor and wait for MCP (unity-launch), verify work (unity-verify), write correct Unity C# (unity-csharp), drive scenes/prefabs (unity-scene), generate assets in Unity or Blender (unity-assets), build players (unity-build), run tests headless (unity-ci), integrate real-world PLANI_TYPE3/carto GIS maps (unity-carto-maps), and orchestrate agentic gamedev workflows — multi-lens reviews and playtest sweeps with subagents (agentic-workflows). Built around CoplayDev's MCP for Unity and ahujasid's blender-mcp.
